Tabs & Accordion

The tabs work. The accordion doesn't. Good luck.

Product Info (Tabs)

A solid product that does what it says. No surprises, no hidden gotchas. Ships in 2 days.

Weight: 340g. Dimensions: 15 x 8 x 2 cm. Material: Recycled aluminium. Battery: 4,000 mAh.

4.6 out of 5 stars (1,240 reviews). Most common praise: build quality. Most common complaint: no USB-C.

FAQ (Accordion)

Go to Settings > Security > Reset Password. You'll get an email within 30 seconds.

Full refund within 30 days, no questions asked. After 30 days, pro-rated refund minus shipping.

Yes, to 40+ countries. Shipping takes 5-10 business days. Customs fees are the buyer's responsibility.
